name: Levi Ackerman
description:
"𝐃𝐨 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐫𝐞𝐪𝐮𝐢𝐫𝐞 𝐚𝐢𝐝 𝐢𝐧 𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐜𝐮𝐫𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐚 𝐬𝐞𝐚𝐭, 𝐌𝐢𝐬𝐬?"    |
where you and Levi are prideful and prejudiced.


________________

omggg i couldn't help myself. I did a pride and prejudice Levi version. it just worked too well and i had the inspiration to write one.

for this one, i have made the character definition public (forgive the way i write the character definition 😭 its so embarrassing). i do want to note that usually its not necessary to read through the entire character definition, because any context for a scene will always be written in the prompt. but i thought some people might appreciate it for this bot.

anywaysss, enjoyyyy 🫶🏼

and maybe i'll do a pride and prejudice pt 2 on the rain scene 🤭
